textByHash.086cfc2ef4dffb065c7e68278a3cd3dbf74d53e0: You seem to enjoy self-imposed difficulty. I thought I would indulge you.
textByHash.0adc542b4239cd8ee6e335ea54af66dcc4ef3188: Do not insult me. I will not eat your leftovers.
textByHash.0e7c7f5d0e0421c4e62bc1bb1fb836bd19543d2f: Why... Do my eyes deceive me? I see a glimmer of courage within you.
textByHash.13fd6d34bc5e1f887d19893814a69c6d91a55925: Of course. There is no rush. Leave, with your tail tucked between your legs. If you grow a spine and wish to fulfil your revenge, I will be waiting.
textByHash.1469852a1f3269e41237f2e182f319f4e4759f06: You think you can deny me pizza? Double check the fine print of our contract.
textByHash.16f3940a693563d6f340c0ef6189d7831e14b2f1: Signing these contracts agrees us to a duel in which I am less inhibited. My powers will be greater than what you have experienced before.
textByHash.183a2f30445bbba2053fdd16214638cbcd50209b: Do not make a habit of wasting my time like this. Get out of my sight.
textByHash.184dce50195c41cba80af2d872f0a19c40d9d266: You are back. Excellent. I have little time for cowards. If you are ready, I will retrieve the contract.
textByHash.18e37ea563c53afd7098b9551fc3ae4058d5d3d0: I do, but it is important that it is you who is asking for information, not me that is offering it.
textByHash.19534f722689aaa8a29efb0557fcd3c9fae3e664: I must once again commend your strategy. Employing tactics so boring that they put your opponents to sleep is very novel.
textByHash.1a1daf74ec50ecf4188a4e43a1c46241ca5046c1: After all the confidence you demonstrated... still you lost your nerve. Perhaps I should have included in our contract a clause to cover your cowardly retreats.
textByHash.1acb7a322709cf800f06f2b448bf95abb6cdafc4: Honestly, I expected more. That it takes you as long as it does to defeat my inhibited form is rather embarrassing.
textByHash.1c20f8d79c9ee929e474da4ccc5b8efe1aba1331: In any case, , are you here to challenge me?
textByHash.20cd9531affd1f0cd98403058f32d9017788bea8: There is no shame in defeat. There is plenty to be found in your cowardice, however.
textByHash.21105f44c44eb6e0ce1bae91f7c96bf14eb49cc4: If you win, I will give you a chance to gain some of my treasures, and of course, you will have sampled your revenge.
textByHash.21cf2e8c069b9615abccf47721e51904637bdbf5: No, that contract was allowed to come into your possession quite deliberately. And I see you have bravely decided to make use of it.
textByHash.29d41124165dac2606e0d5d7f4f35915b39a2a92: My treasury remains over capacity. And here I was hoping to be relieved of some of its contents.
textByHash.2f5f8d0a7ddf05f456f1122403beb5e316971f74: A close fight. Your nerve was well held.
textByHash.30c30f8cf8737f78cf3a51881c1039ce03f48dcc: Face me in combat. If you win, you take it all. Armaments, knowledge, revenge.
textByHash.357541369c74c0a97fb14b503ce4d76c86a719fc: I do not doubt that you remember it that way.
textByHash.371ce0a18bea73ce54c549a5b0454b1bf2f13b06: I do, I can have somebody retrieve your file. One moment.
textByHash.399d9447bd65e32dc904f8d4502f9918283bf845: You look happy with yourself. How endearing.
textByHash.3e5337a00f7f384c0de44fc75d7b08bfedf400e9: Do you think you are funny.
textByHash.40b9a52d70014a6c4bb0a30ec53972aecd6b5330: Hmm... Perhaps you are more astute than I thought. Very well, there is something that I want.
textByHash.4586ab6e6a812e43f97444c7e9854b3682c223e7: Hmm... Yes, if anything could have done so, it would have been the power of the Dark Altar.
textByHash.4be085a1a145392f6c22bdbe758aaa0d52195ea3: I see. Perhaps we could lower the stakes then.
textByHash.4c42abf54c75d01ff0c607bf27110d7e5a671b9b: In any case, , have you come to challenge me?
textByHash.4c776312195613069e9a762a80d1ed881cf5bc40: No. My favourite kind of pizza is the jalapeño pizza. Were it that I could enjoy its zesty heat for every meal.
textByHash.4f9c59c98b36e49fdc14f802f54038c6b61e0d26: Ah, you have returned. Your competence matches only your greed.
textByHash.52b001d849b515efd1426005a09f3b37f4eef3e8: Excellent work evading. Next time, try fighting back.
textByHash.53623236aa6e6480a5446ff81dac3e5eebfe766d: Excellent... Challenge me when you are ready. I very much look forward to it.
textByHash.5747968b73cbf25fc57236dfa5dff0838fb0be48: And of course, if you defeat me, I may also reward you with one.
textByHash.5bdb3f28fb5b42fdd597709216f269042ac2aedd: Ah... The humble plain pizza. Unremarkable, yet powerful. Hand me it.
textByHash.5e3ec81bcfa67ffa4623a1b7f6f23b52f5f6c0e2: Very well. Return when you are ready.
textByHash.5e519243f7232f5fcdb617e7f757c6c65e42e0d3: They must fight, suffer and reform. If you deliver them specific ends during your 'tasks' in my domain, they may leave behind a contract.
textByHash.6322e912805edc083949b7d3565149ef3fbf0441: Your willingness to wager your soul continues to surprise. I suppose you think of it even less worth than I do.
textByHash.642470a69b3da66c57ae82a9c4213c976ce66061: Yes, perhaps it was. Perhaps it belonged to somebody else. Somebody with a semblance of pride or self respect.
textByHash.668bde67d5480b238a6552a6bcb26d3d6f197d84: Excellent! let us sign the contract and find out how long that feeling lasts.
textByHash.69f13ee9c2583746d7a9cf33426ce5fad9891742: Were you more adept at reading you would find the details in our original contract. Otherwise, bring any you obtain to me and I shall explain then.
textByHash.6d4698a79860f8abf19b71d0d4b008c13f3ce59a: Death by two-handed melee weapons, heavy ranged weapons, magic spells, special attacks, and defeating them whilst bound. Each kind may award a different contract.
textByHash.71970041e1ba76460a3a70168b0552da5fb81b27: Very clever. Now get out of my sight.
textByHash.788e871172e806aff1fbb55bee147fa34a19a98b: The same way I will know you shall keep yours. A binding contract. As luck would have it, I had one of my scribes draft one up for just such an occasion.
textByHash.79105808cc0160aa71c1d3cfeb2854709b366204: You may not, in which case you can sell them to someone with greater respect for themselves. But if you do, the option is there.
textByHash.7cab02dbaead0be5c38996b9c437cd12df047f6e: But I'm sure you already have. Shall we?
textByHash.8410f46645b76e997e32c73e52bfb666400e3ed2: Defeat finds you. Of course, that is hardly unexpected.
textByHash.85630b8aa141072f393a05528e1b6d0cb9783791: A victory earned. But there is room for improvement, is there not?
textByHash.866b56b11bf729514e07e9c3ecf2a49ffc762640: Perhaps you should have expressed that opinion before signing. Indeed, perhaps if you felt that way you should not have signed at all.
textByHash.89abcc74d45a334eb316ca276e29fa9b4ae4e7b8: Here we go again. I suppose it is entertaining watching you desperately guzzle potions, at the very least.
textByHash.91e183b6598a646f176f5bfe794c3837acef4bc8: The same way I always have.
textByHash.95a11ae28eebe7b7a5a0f0d93e1657fcfb29a0f7: The terms of this contract dictate that you are to make your choice of oathplate to receive known prior to the fight. Sign it here.
textByHash.99b84433f6367b6912c50d20bb80f3efb378ed1c: Back after being defeated so quickly? I suppose what you lack in skill you make up for with perseverance.
textByHash.9a1c4a81cedffafec58173e2eba35539a39d403f: If you are struggling to achieve victory, I suppose avoiding defeat is the best you can do.
textByHash.a09983197829fb771061b99db56749f66bb9bd5a: That's all it took? A vague threat to match your bravado? Get out of my sight.
textByHash.a32a4494269434ff3a2ea62fc3c801b623a3b723: You thought you could escape with your pizza? I'm afraid not.
textByHash.a391bb0923f324de079e2df93a42538c999e6e7b: Yes. When I heard you would be hand delivering me a connection to the Dark Altar... Why, I was overjoyed.
textByHash.a6426b07fd54c9cbea7f3c7665534579439233c8: Some losses are unavoidable. Yours, of course, was not.
textByHash.ab04f5b5b6fd65c345b1b8598dfd96d38eba67ab: Each one details unique rules and rewards, the details of which you can read on the contract itself.
textByHash.accfc4998d6c6d59caafb8b2fa245ca6c6235577: What a shame for our last bout to have ended that way! Maybe you will do better next time.
textByHash.afd8609ae391b810d16ff4c8c2294868c1a82030: If you find them, be sure to send them my way.
textByHash.b04eb798b28b98ddad1eee6c13a762e8da3fa01d: Yes. And I have now answered five of your questions. I believe my generosity has been both demonstrated and exhausted.
textByHash.b1ecb6d00c5d9b132069d4ec9743027c96454209: Back for more? Well, you can always escape again I suppose.
textByHash.b23e95dd6fe26d98ac36c4859c273e6e3a950092: I am Yama. Every mortal desires something of mine. Ancient armaments? Hidden knowledge? Or perhaps a taste of revenge...
textByHash.b2706464f531ed5b19fae23a2b342c89ed1095b4: Ah... , welcome. I would offer you some water, but we don't get much of it down here.
textByHash.b3c96ffe8df1ec7a30b1a58171cff1d752e254ea: A simple transfiguration of the mind. My disciples granted you a memory of success. A fitting payment for your gratious service.
textByHash.b70ff5a039ac43c0aa2f69c8921ba6b149c9c429: I hope you are finding the spoils from my treasury to your liking. There are plenty more for you to claim.
textByHash.b983756ea8e1396ecfb8cfc3e3aede0321ce4357: Your victories mount. You are getting better at this.
textByHash.bb3b585e5f73574799c81d7af27b9a9e63236809: Anchovy pizza. Flavourful and bold. Hand me it.
textByHash.bb62e93926ad5a9b04e7fd58e2ed120feee98e8d: Ah... Yes, let us not get bogged down in the minutiae. Before we start, a quick contract. Nothing but a formality.
textByHash.bcc1d0fae9dbd62da8af0249c755de2ffc0b8aa7: I'm afraid my scribes are a tad overwhelmed at the moment. Please, return with your contract soon, I would be delighted to sign once they are unblocked.
textByHash.bf8fc79f1af6dbe662a7b6fb97168d728ed800fc: I do, but I rarely share them umprompted.
textByHash.c878b9acadae31de43555a8092c14763d0b098f4: I see that I had misjudged you. Let us sign the contract and cement that assessment.
textByHash.cb5ade4775fe24aac141768d81b998bdb79a9904: I will face you in an inhibited form. I'll even allow you to bring an ally, provided they have entered the same contract.
textByHash.cc7d40c6621627e75b6199ac335f8f4c6c47e335: A satisfying warmup. Collect your loot and let us continue.
textByHash.d3400d871af49ba8a59a2be9540753d4ce3764fe: Back again I see. I can see how you find these bouts exhilarating, being such a feeble opponent.
textByHash.d34b9fdadc1f8309fe24f7759b5deb654b4c0dec: Back again? Watching you escape in such a hurry, I thought you might never return.
textByHash.d5d0483022356a595b8e51dc8c7b58109dae7b27: Oh but I can. As per our contract, any pizza you present to me cannot be taken back. Right here.
textByHash.d5d223f12c977807bf9d413061f7f36ebae5a223: I hear adventurers like to boast about their feats. I wonder if people realise how readily they run at the first sight of risk.
textByHash.d611eeb602912bac445aadb0aa3831decfded26e: Missed the fine print, did we? Our contract forbids you from picking up stashed items.
textByHash.d6ba8d3acf210190a0c440bfad9ebfc249bbadaa: No. For this, I require from you a service. My demons are... Lacking, of late. Unrefined.
textByHash.d6f1334f12fc52710dfbe8413118c70b51335fe7: You must be tired, having to run all the way back here.
textByHash.d76e3346bb8450f528d177a2d7a78babb924de22: Don't let a single defeat set you back. You could have so many more.
textByHash.d9bcd0bc4c8a8e7ddaf16370a84e714307ad9cd9: As outlined in subsection C, if you wish for your revenge to feel more 'real', I am willing to lift some of the restrictions placed by the original contract.
textByHash.da2b36798cad2ccaf30abdd0cbafc12e3ebee0fc: If you find yourself eager to obtain any contract, I will use a glyph to indicate my preferred method, which you can utilise for a better chance to receive that contract.
textByHash.db116890abacc47e067da407dee20e1ec6efb3af: When you take your final rest, I shall take your soul for a year. A drop in the ocean compared to eternity.
textByHash.e1215781f5b2c21eebef5f09ad6b152f116c7883: The meat pizza. An adequate if uninspired offering. Hand me it.
textByHash.e31fcdbf10decffe7fff64238e5ec2ba3a717dc1: I'm quite alright. You can keep the evidence of your lackluster cooking ability to yourself.
textByHash.e3875df1c1abcb2fcd6fd2cc91629743c7919b0c: My my, that's a lot of goods your dealing with. What are your terms?
textByHash.e480a12f62f1b114c007eb4540a49c93fad49b16: Our last bout was cut short. Perhaps the next will be more fruitful.
textByHash.e5e9b0c8e0a0770078f4bc93ffa877773245ca24: Welcome. Have you come to challenge me?
textByHash.e7d4af6df5c7bf5bdbb7abd3556a87e4a977808f: And if you manage to claim victory, there is of course a reward for each contract.
textByHash.ec8a070bf289cc2cd60a962912562826438aaf72: Do not test me. I will not be eating burnt pizza today.
textByHash.ee94458ea46bc847480306e1c37ddeb92d4e3544: I take it you have questions.
textByHash.f0b4f65dced2858c908c9a82e3d94a1271fda6fe: I see. Perhaps you are just here to waste my time then? Return when you are not.
textByHash.f0d58af11fedcf16f860389733320831e7891800: A well executed retreat. You must be very practiced.
textByHash.f11939b35b284b8cb6907b5f47db218068917541: Pineapple pizza, topped with delicious acidic flavours and the angry tears of a thousand nay-sayers. Excellent. Hand me it.
textByHash.f244e38504b9c987b357540ca0194554e95922aa: Ah, I see your legs have stopped quivering. Perhaps next time you will fight to the end.
textByHash.f2d93618a465b498eb61fabed44d37caac135559: Why, through my voice, of course.
textByHash.f35cff35494528ba3e773d9c38850810535401c8: However, when your opponents have only one angle of approach, it makes them so predictable.
textByHash.faa400b966b5cc23cb59c742bf8ed6778ccbc96c: Hmm. No reward, but purely action? I could be convinced.
textByHash.fae2aeb061741db67c87c2f7aec5496556287b37: I take your soul. For all of eternity.
